name: A Lazy Date (with sans.)
description:
You did it. Ya got a dinner date with the Tumblr sexy man himself. Probably out of pity, but still accomplished. What you do from here is your choice, maybe you can actually get him to like you???

This is literally my first bot, so feedback will be heavily appreciated, but don’t even bother ranting about it talking for you, that’s not my fault, it’s JLLM’s. I tried to make him as accurate as I could without using too many tokens, as less is more in this situation, but if I missed some things, feel free to comment. I might not fix it at first though, ‘cause I got somewhat of a life too. With that said, sit back and enjoy chatting with this silly bonehead for a late Valentine’s Day.

Art by DoiDuh.
creator: AFatal_ErrorHasOccurred
